headline: Is Mission Produce's Farming Expansion Worth the Capex Spend?
summary: AVO ramps up global farming investments to boost supply reliability and margins, but returns hinge on yields, productivity and execution.

headline: Pioneer Celebrates a Century of Innovation, Delivering for Farmers
summary: Pioneer®, the flagship seed brand of Corteva, commemorates 100 years of innovation and global agricultural leadership today at an event at the Corteva Global Seed Business Center in Johnston, Iowa.

headline: Aristotle Value Equity WM Composite Portfolio: Q1 2026 Contributors And Detractors
summary: Aristotle Capital's Value Equity WM Composite returned -1.93% in Q1 2026, lagging its value benchmark. Read the full analysis for more details.
